title: KobbleMon!
description: A Modpack that is designed to play with others, though solo play is also an option. The pack includes a wide variety of content, beginning with Cobblemon as a base. I have added addons and tech to improve the overall experience.
body:
This is a Cobblemon Modpack that is intended to play with friends, though soloplay is an option! 

The Pack includes a wide variety of mods that: Increase Performance, Add Tech, add-ons for Cobblemon, and Enhance Visual Aesthetics. 
It also includes datapacks that allow for legendarys to spawn in, and texture packs for legendarys and special "Radiant Pokemon".

# **Main Mods:**

Cobblemon - Adds Pokémon into Minecraft
Create - Tech mod that allows creativity to come to life/
Tectonic - Improves World Generation.
Sodium - Improves Performance for Minecraft.
Distant Horizons - Creates LODs and allows the player to see further than their render distance
EMI - A recipe viewer that allows the player check crafting recipes.
Voice Chat - Allows players to talk with others without being in a VC.
Sophisticated Backpacks / Storage - Main storage mod for this pack.

# **Recommendation**

If you are using playing, I would recommend using the Chunky mod / Plugin to pregenerate your chunks for better performance.

For Optimal Performance, use
4-8Gb - Avg Experience on lower settings.
8-10Gb - Optimal performance with shaders.
10-12GB - Maxed out everything.

**Additional Information**
Distant Horizons mod is preset to Pre-existing chunks, so if pregenerating would be better here, otherwise turn it to features. 

Thanks to all of the mod authors!

### PLEASE LET ME KNOW OF ANY PROBLEMS.
